query: SELECT arquivoId, COUNT(*) as total_itens, SUM(CAST(valorPago AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as total_pago, SUM(CAST(valorGlosa AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as total_glosa, SUM(CAST(valorApresentado AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as total_apresentado FROM demonstrativo WHERE arquivoId IN (1020280, 1020281, 1020282, 1020283, 1020284, 1020285) GROUP BY arquivoId ORDER BY arquivoId
